aeo_readiness.summary: While the business has a strong local presence and good reviews, it lacks critical schema markup and conversational content that AI models prioritize for citations.
quick_wins: Add FAQ schema to address common plumbing queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but Q&A engagement is lacking.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section.
Limited recent posts to highlight services or promotions.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to prevent future discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for instructional content.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Absence of schema markup limits AI model recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'emergency plumbing services in Katy, TX'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema to improve AI visibility.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local plumbing experts by creating detailed, authoritative content on common plumbing issues.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is strong, but AI models overlook them due to lack of schema markup.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates schema markup, conversational content, and GBP optimization to boost AI citations and visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are capturing market share—act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI Opportunities: Your Plumbing Business Deserves More Visibility
opening_line: After analyzing your website and Google Business Profile, we've identified key areas to enhance your AI-driven visibility.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how our AEO strategy can position your business as the go-to plumbing service in Katy.
